name: Dasatinib plus quercetin
summary: Senolytic combination tracked primarily under cellular senescence, with staged human pilot, randomized feasibility, biomarker, cognition/mobility, bone-metabolism, animal healthspan, and adjacent telomere-dysfunction records.
mechanism_summary: Combines a tyrosine kinase inhibitor and flavonoid to transiently disable senescent-cell anti-apoptotic defenses, preferentially clearing some senescent-cell populations in a tissue- and context-dependent way.

open_questions: Which senescent-cell populations are beneficial or risky to clear in each tissue context
Whether early disease-specific functional and biomarker signals replicate in controlled, adequately powered human studies
Whether intermittent dosing has acceptable long-term preventive-use safety in older adults
Whether telomere-dysfunction changes reflect capping repair or removal of damaged endothelial cells
